creator: bruth@wmht.org
text:
I compiled the port on both machines which are both using the xl net driver. Upon running the port you get the compiled line, a blank line, and then the header bar. No traffic is reported. Upon killing the process it reports seeing(insert # of packets) packets and dropping 0. There is definately traffic going through. I let it run for 30 minutes with nothing happening. Version .4 works fine.

How-To-Repeat: Compile the port and attempt to run it.
